title: Architecture Exploration
description: Explore RevDeck v0.1 architecture from RevDeck.txt and brainstorm artifacts. Map core modules, data model, storage, object graph, importer/analyzer boundaries, and integration points. Include recommended Rust crates if justified.
result_json: {"id":"E1","status":"completed","findings":"v0.1 架构应收敛为 Rust + Ratatui + SQLite 的 Binary Triage 工作台：SQLite objects/edges 与 ObjectRef 是稳定核心；importer/analyzer 只写 normalized objects、edges、scores、diagnostics；TUI、Function Radar、navigation、analysis memory、findings/export 都消费同一对象图。F-007/F-008 仅做本地 xref/path 与 fixture adapter contract，避免插件市场、完整 CFG、反编译和动态能力拖垮 MVP。","analysis_file":".workflow/.csv-wave/20260513-plan-revdeck-v01-binary-triage/E1-analysis.md","error":""}

title: Implementation Exploration
description: Explore implementation approach for a fresh Rust TUI codebase. Identify project scaffold, CLI commands, Ratatui app structure, SQLite access patterns, binary parsing/indexing flow, command bar, and testing patterns.
result_json: {"id":"E2","status":"completed","findings":"实现探索已基于 RevDeck.txt、context 和 F-001/F-002/F-003 完成。建议用 Rust workspace 拆分 cli/core/db/index/tui；CLI 覆盖 init/open/import/index/stats/report/tui；SQLite 用 deterministic object IDs、analysis_runs 和 analyst memory 分离；索引先做 metadata/sections/symbols/imports/strings，函数优先 symbol-backed，stripped binary 明确降级；Ratatui 用 Elm-style AppState/Event/Action/Render，三栏布局加命令栏；测试聚焦 fixture binary、repo/migration、scoring、command parser、TestBackend snapshot 和 CLI smoke。","analysis_file":".workflow/.csv-wave/20260513-plan-revdeck-v01-binary-triage/E2-analysis.md","error":""}

title: UX And Product Exploration
description: Explore v0.1 product workflow, TUI layout, navigation model, Function Radar behavior, analysis memory, findings export, and acceptance criteria from an analyst perspective.
result_json: {"id":"E3","status":"completed","findings":"v0.1 UX 应围绕“导入二进制→Function Radar→对象跳转→分析记忆→finding→Markdown/JSON 报告”的单一 analyst 闭环。三栏 TUI 需用统一 selected_object_id、ObjectRef/Relation 和 history，避免各 lens 状态分裂。Function Radar 必须可解释，reason 可跳转为证据；notes/tags/renames/status 持久化且不破坏 evidence links；导出前要显式提示缺失或断裂证据。","analysis_file":".workflow/.csv-wave/20260513-plan-revdeck-v01-binary-triage/E3-analysis.md","error":""}

title: Risk And Test Exploration
description: Explore risk factors and test strategy. Cover binary fixture determinism, function-boundary accuracy, scoring explainability, migration safety, TUI state tests, command parser tests, and report round trips.
result_json: {"id":"E4","status":"completed","findings":"已完成风险与测试探索，结论聚焦 v0.1 Binary Triage：最大风险是确定性与信任链断裂，包括 fixture 非确定、函数边界被过度承诺、评分不可解释、迁移破坏对象引用、TUI 状态不可测、命令解析误写状态、报告导出不可 round-trip。建议把稳定 ObjectRef、score breakdown、analysis_runs、迁移表、TUI reducer、parser/resolver/executor 分层、JSON canonical export 纳入 feature-level plan 验收门槛。","analysis_file":".workflow/.csv-wave/20260513-plan-revdeck-v01-binary-triage/E4-analysis.md","error":""}
